name: Rust pre-push check
description: Format, lint, and test Rust before pushing so CI stays green.
rules: Never push Rust changes without fmt, clippy, and tests passing locally.
Treat clippy warnings as errors on CI-gated crates.
steps: Run `cargo fmt --all` and stage the result.
Run `cargo fmt --all --check` to confirm formatting is clean.
Run `cargo test` for the affected crates.
Only push once all three succeed.
author: lectern
